title: ctenitis biformis
intro: Ctenitis biformis, also known as the Two-Formed Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Ctenitis biformis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of certain diseases, such as cancer and diabetes. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
